title: Technical Trainer - MNC Semicon / EAST
description:
The Opportunity

  • Global MNC in the Semiconductor industry
  • Seeking for Technical Training Instructor
  • Monday - Friday, 8:00am - 5:30pm (Work schedule will be based on class timings)
  • Shift allowance & transportation will be provided for supporting alternative work schedules (Weekdays only)
  • Nearest MRT: Upper Changi
  • Completion Bonus

The Talent

  • Diploma / Degree in Electrical, Electronics, Mechanical, Mechatronic, Microelectronics or any Engineering related studies
  • Preferably 2 - 4 year experience in semicon related industry
  • Good technical problem solving, troubleshooting and follow-up skills;
  • Experience in Assembly, Build, Test, Preventive Maintenance
  • Candidates are available to work flexible hours based on class schedules

The Job

  • Conducts technical training in both classroom lecture and practical scenarios
  • Able to provide related experience to training
  • To perform and follow closely to the training curriculum
  • Able to diagnose and resolve technical issues
  • Responsible for complete customer satisfaction
  • Plan and assist managers and senior as required
  • Complies with safety procedures and protocols to consistently demonstrates safety as value


Next Step

  • Simply click on 'Apply here' to drop your resume or email to edmond.lee@adecco.com
  • All shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


Edmond Lee

Direct Line: 8206 8857

EA License No: 91C2918

Personnel Registration Number: R23114813

postedCompany.description:
The Adecco Group is the world's leading provider of HR solutions. With over 35,000 FTE employees and over 5,200 branches, in over 60 countries and territories around the world, we offer a wide variety of services, connecting more than 650,000 associates with over 100,000 clients every day.

The services we offer fall into the broad categories of temporary staffing, permanent placement, career transition and talent development, as well as outsourcing and consulting. The Adecco Group is based in Zurich-Glattbrugg, Switzerland and we are a Fortune Global 500 company listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
postedCompany.name: ADECCO PERSONNEL PTE LTD
